title: The CAAD14 You Can’t Buy, Giant’s Aero Fine Print, and Mid-Ride Road Rage
content:
We challenge the 18-watt claims on the new Propel, examine why Cannondale made the CAAD14 heavier, and debate the absolute best gas station desperation snacks.

Read the full article at The CAAD14 You Can’t Buy, Giant’s Aero Fine Print, and Mid-Ride Road Rage on Velo.
author: Josh Ross
